_doc: === NARRATIVE REVISION: Git-like snapshot of the narrative at a point in time ===
_id: OPTIONAL. UUIDv7. Auto-generated if null. Time-ordered for chronological listing.
_narrative_id: REQUIRED. Rewritten on import to match the imported narrative slug.
_parent_id: OPTIONAL. UUID of the previous revision in the chain. NULL = root revision.
author: skill:tensa-narrative-llm
_author: REQUIRED. Authoring agent / human name. Skill writes use `skill:<skill-name>`.
message: Auto-repair pass: fixed pacing in scene 3, tightened dialogue voice for Volkov.
_message: REQUIRED. Commit-message-style description of what changed in this revision.

snapshot._doc: Full NarrativeSnapshot — includes situations, participations, and a content_hash. Omitted here for brevity. See src/types.rs::NarrativeSnapshot.

_snapshot: REQUIRED. NarrativeSnapshot object embedding the full state. Re-imported revisions retain their snapshots verbatim — restoring an old revision may reference remapped entity/situation IDs after a non-merge import (the importer emits a one-line warning when this happens).
_counts: OPTIONAL. RevisionCounts summary surfaced in /list_narrative_revisions for the writer UI.
